resource.name: zerocount
resource.object: You must select one or more record

resource.name: orderOpsMustHaveOneRecord
resource.object: You must select exactly one record for order operations

resource.name: orderlineOpsMustHaveOneRecord
resource.object: You must select exactly one order line record for order line operations

resource.name: OpenPreviewFormError
resource.object: Unable to open label preview form.

resource.name: OpenPreviewFormError
resource.object: Unable to open label preview form.

resource.name: validFromCanNotBeNull
resource.object: Column 'Valid from' does not allow nulls.\n

resource.name: validToCanNotBeNull
resource.object: Column 'Valid to' does not allow nulls.\n

resource.name: qaMark1CanNotBeNull
resource.object: Column 'Qa Mark 1' does not allow nulls.\n

resource.name: PrepareLabelError
resource.object: An error occurred while preparing label.

resource.name: ExportLabelError
resource.object: An error occured while exporting label.

resource.name: NoPrintEngineAvailable
resource.object: No print engine installed on the computer for this type of label.

resource.name: NoPreviewImage
resource.object: No image data returned from preview.

resource.name: e2
resource.object: Exception creating unit operation parameters from XML

resource.name: embeddedAlwaysCreated
resource.object: Embedded operation can not be removed. \nA default operation is always created.

resource.name: NoAccessForDeleteOrder
resource.object: No access for handling this order type

resource.name: noAccess
resource.object: No access for handling this order type

resource.name: noAccessHdr
resource.object: No access for handling this order type

resource.name: noAccessForChanging
resource.object: No access for changing this type of orders

resource.object: No access for changing orders with {0} assign types

resource.name: DeleteSingleRow
resource.object: Do you want to delete this row?

resource.name: NoAccessForDeleteOrderLine
resource.object: No access for handling this order line assignment type

resource.object: No access for changing order lines with {0} assign types.

resource.name: repisnotordrep
resource.object: Report {0} is not an order report

resource.name: doDeletePallet
resource.object: Do you want to delete the pallet?

resource.object: Do you want to re-print the pallet label?

resource.name: doOpenPallet
resource.object: Do you want to open the pallet?

resource.name: doClosePallet
resource.object: Do you want to close the pallet?

resource.name: errGettingMainOp
resource.object: Error getting and configuring main operation

resource.name: NothingSelected
resource.object: At least one row must be selected

resource.name: errGettingMainOp
resource.object: Error getting and configuring main operation

resource.name: noprunit
resource.object: GUI configuration does not include a process unit ID

resource.name: prunitclient
resource.object: Cannot configuration connection to base system

resource.name: OutsideRange
resource.object: Prod. day is outside allowed range.

resource.name: lotCreateQuestion
resource.object: Do you want to create new lot?

resource.name: zerocount
resource.object: You must select on or more record

resource.name: invalidData
resource.object: Invalid data in grid. Printing was stopped.

resource.name: ChangeDataStatusError
resource.object: Unable to change data status for process period.

resource.name: toomanyrecs
resource.object: Operation can only be executed on one record at a time

resource.name: doCloseOrder
resource.object: Do you want to close the order ?

resource.name: nopropfound
resource.object: {0} is not the name of a property

resource.name: doCreateStockTake
resource.object: Do you want to create a new stocktake?

resource.name: faileSetDoneCount
resource.object: Could not set the count to done.\n{0}

resource.name: failSetDoneCountEx
resource.object: Could not set the count to done.

resource.name: doCompleteStockTake
resource.object: Do you want to complete the stocktake?

resource.name: failCompleteStockTake
resource.object: Could not set the count to complete.\n{0}

resource.name: failCompleteStockTakeEx
resource.object: Could not set the count to complete.

resource.name: doCancelStockTake
resource.object: Do you want to cancel the stocktake?

resource.name: doCreateStocktakeLocation
resource.object: No stocktake active on this location. Start stock take?

resource.name: couldNotStartLocationStocktake
resource.object: Could not start stocktake on location ({0}).

resource.name: noStockTakeToShow
resource.object: No stocktake chosen to display a report for

resource.name: tooManyCurrentRow
resource.object: Too many rows chosen for this operation

resource.name: doYouWantToFinishCountST
resource.object: Do you want to finish counting for {0}?

resource.name: doYouWantToConfirmST
resource.object: Do you want to confirm stocktake {0}?

resource.name: doYouWantToCancelST
resource.object: Do you want to cancel stocktake {0}?

resource.name: startLocationStocktakeCaption
resource.object: Start a new stocktake on location

resource.name: unitOpDiff
resource.object: The contents of the operation definition differs from the version in the database. Please refresh the view.

resource.name: noprunit
resource.object: GUI configuration does not include a process unit ID

resource.name: prunitclient
resource.object: Cannot configuration connection to base system

resource.name: UserNameNotUnique
resource.object: The user name '{0}' is already in use.\nTwo active users cannot have the same username.

resource.name: doFixLocAll
resource.object: Do you want to fix all units on {0} and location {1}?

resource.name: doFixAll
resource.object: Do you want to fix all units on {0}?

resource.name: doFixSpecificStatusAll
resource.object: Do you want to fix units with status {0} on inventory {1} and location {2}?

resource.name: doFixSpecificStatus
resource.object: Do you want to fix units with status {0} on {1}?

resource.name: doStartStocktakeOnLocation
resource.object: Do you want to start a new stocktake on {0} and location {1}?

resource.name: doStartStocktake
resource.object: Do you want to start a new stocktake on {0}?

resource.name: doYouWantToCancelST
resource.object: Do you want to cancel stocktake {0}?

resource.object: Do you want to finish counting for {0}?

resource.name: doYouWantToConfirmST
resource.object: Do you want to confirm stocktake {0}?

resource.name: doYouWantToConfirmSTWithErrors
resource.object: Not all units have been fixed. \nDo you still want to confirm stocktake {0}?

resource.name: errorDoingItemEntering
resource.object: Error handling corrected item entering inventory during fix. Reason: {0}

resource.name: errorDoingItemLeaving
resource.object: Error handling corrected item leaving inventory during fix. Reason: {0}

resource.name: errorDoingPackEntering
resource.object: Error handling corrected pack entering inventory during fix. Reason: {0}

resource.name: errorDoingPackLeaving
resource.object: Error handling corrected pack leaving inventory during fix. Reason: {0}

resource.name: packsnotloadedQuit
resource.object: Units have not been loaded. If you quit now no corrective actions will be done.\n\nDo you want to quit?

resource.name: notallfinished
resource.object: Operation has not been done on all units. If you quit now corrective actions will not be performed on all packs.\n\nDo you want to quit?

resource.name: loadingRecords
resource.object: Loading records. This can take several moments

resource.name: queryPalletNull
resource.object: Pallet loaded without any result. Aborting operation.

resource.name: queryNull
resource.object: Packs loaded without any result. Aborting operation.

resource.name: thismanypaleltsloaded
resource.object: Loaded {0} pallets for operation. Job is starting

resource.name: thismanypacksloaded
resource.object: Loaded {0} packs for operation. Job is starting

resource.name: AllHandledText
resource.object: Operation has been done on all units

resource.name: PleaseSweep
resource.object: Please sweep card and select station to login or logout of the station.

resource.name: OpenImportLabelFormError
resource.object: Unable to open label import form.

resource.name: EditLabelError
resource.object: Unable to open editor for label.

resource.name: barcodeNoLocationCodeFound
resource.object: No Location code found in scanned barcod

resource.name: barcodeNoSsccFound
resource.object: No SSCC found in scanned barcode

resource.name: productCodeNotFound
resource.object: Could not determine product code from scanned barcode

resource.name: locationNotFound
resource.object: No location with the selected location code found

resource.name: firstSelectProduct
resource.object: First enter or scan a product code

resource.name: productNotFound
resource.object: No product with the selected product code exists

resource.name: failedToInitMultiLot
resource.object: Failed to create control for process unit {0}. Message:{1}.

resource.name: pruClientNotCreated
resource.object: Process unit client could not be created

resource.name: dateIsTooOld
resource.object: Date {0} is not allowed. Minimum allowed date is {1}

resource.name: dateIsTooYoung
resource.object: Date {0} is not allowed. Maximum allowed date is {1}.

resource.name: linkedLotsNotUpdates
resource.object: Failed to update linked lots. Message:{0}

resource.name: CancelMessage
resource.object: Do you really want to close the wizard without saving your data?

resource.name: completionLabel.Text
resource.object: All the information needed to create a new composite activity has been gathered. Press the Finish button on the bottom of the dialog to cerate the new composite activity.

resource.name: doRemoveOrder
resource.object: Do you want to remove order from assigned orders?

resource.name: DeleteSingleRow
resource.object: Do you want to delete this row?

resource.name: TestDataNameExists
resource.object: Test data with this name already exists. Please try again.

resource.name: SaveNewRecord
resource.object: The new record has not been saved. Please confirm the record before proceeding.

resource.name: SaveChangesRecord
resource.object: The record has not been saved. Please confirm the record before proceeding.

resource.name: PleaseWait
resource.object: Fetching data from service. Please wait a moment before selecting a new row

resource.name: ErrorFetchingOperation
resource.object: Error occurred while fetching operation from service.

resource.name: DoWantToCancel
resource.object: Do you want to cancel all changes?

resource.name: errorCommitingToDB
resource.object: Error updating the server with changes

resource.name: CliboardNoXml
resource.object: Clipboard does not contain valid xml

resource.name: TestDataNameRequired
resource.object: Name for test data is required!

resource.name: CancelAllChanges
resource.object: Do you want to cancel all changes?

resource.name: OverrideCurOp
resource.object: Do you want to override current operation with contents from the clipboard?

resource.name: errorInserting
resource.object: Error inserting new matching lot record.

resource.name: onlyOneRow
resource.object: You must select exactly one record

resource.name: errorFetchingPrunitState
resource.object: Error fetching process unit state. Name expression can not be modified.

resource.name: cantEditAutoFilterRow
resource.object: Can't edit the auto filter row.

resource.name: PromptEnterNumberOfLinesToSplitInto
resource.object: Enter number of lines to split into

resource.name: failCreatePlanText
resource.object: Failed to create a new production plan.\nPlease see the log for error message.

resource.name: noShiftHoursText
resource.object: The selected production area has no production hours defined.\n Please fill in the correct shift hours.

resource.name: confirmCancelPlanText
resource.object: Can't delete the selected production plan.\nCancel the plan instead?

resource.name: Menu_ShowLinesWithNoDispatchTime
resource.object: Show lines with no dispatch time
